_meta.purpose: Client identity file for the NFG/newUM project. Every fact here is confirmed by the user or vendor. Unconfirmed items live in the 'unknowns' array.

confirmation_model.confirmed_user: Stated explicitly in the onboarding message shared by Carlos Carrillo
confirmation_model.confirmed_vendor: Stated in vendor documentation or official links
confirmation_model.needs_confirmation: Present in this file under 'unknowns' — not used as fact until confirmed

4D_classification.Describe: All facts are labeled with their source and category.
4D_classification.Delegate: Facts grouped by domain: identity, team, environments, databases, tools, documents, policies.
4D_classification.Diligent: No invented data. Every value traces to its source. Unknowns are explicit.
4D_classification.Disclose: The 'unknowns' array discloses every gap. Nothing assumed silently.
